rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope before use in AGREE contracts.
Resolve type mismatches by aligning helper declarations with the correct scalar types (int, real, bool) used in expressions.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, validate that all referenced identifiers are declared or visible in the same annex scope.
Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions by matching declared helper types with the types of the values they represent.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks and placed in valid component type or implementation scopes.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions; avoid referencing subcomponent ports directly in type contracts.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types that are not present in the analyzed model's configured dependencies.
Avoid adding architecture elements to fix unresolved references; instead, correct the root cause or remove invalid clauses.
